home.tagline: Religious Ritual Services at Nashik's Sacred Godavari Ghats
home.description: We guide families with deep reverence and compassion through sacred post-death rituals on the holy banks of the Godavari River. Every ceremony is performed with authenticity, care, and spiritual dignity.

about.subtitle: ABOUT GURUJI
about.title: Shri Sagar Kshemkalyani
about.paragraph1: With over 20 years of experience, Shri Sagar Kshemkalyani has been serving families at the sacred Ramkund on the banks of the holy Godavari River in Nashik, guiding them through religious rituals with devotion, authenticity, and respect for tradition.
about.paragraph2: He specializes in a wide range of Vedic and ancestral ceremonies including Dashakriya Vidhi, Pind Daan, Asthi Visarjan, Shraddha Vidhi, Narayan Nagbali, Tripindi Shraddha, Pitru Dosh Nivaran and other religious rituals performed according to traditional customs.
about.paragraph3: One of the unique services offered is access to and guidance regarding ancestral family records (Namawali / Namolya) preserved through generations, helping families trace and maintain their sacred lineage and heritage.
about.paragraph4: Guruji has extensive experience serving families belonging to the traditions of Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, Gujarat and Telugu communities, ensuring that rituals are conducted according to the specific customs and religious practices followed by each family.
about.paragraph5: Known for his sincerity, knowledge of scriptures and compassionate guidance, Shri Sagar Kshemkalyani has earned the trust of thousands of families over the years.

services.subtitle: OUR SERVICES
services.title: Religious Services at
services.description: Complete assistance and guidance for Vedic, ancestral and religious rituals performed according to traditional customs.
services.dashakriyaDesc: Traditional post-death rituals performed according to Hindu customs.
services.pindDaanDesc: Sacred offering rituals dedicated to ancestors and departed souls.
services.asthiDesc: Guidance and arrangements for immersion of ashes at Ramkund.
services.narayanDesc: Special Vedic ritual performed for ancestral peace and karmic relief.
services.tripindiDesc: Ritual for satisfying unsatisfied ancestral souls and attaining blessings.
services.pitruDesc: Religious remedies performed for ancestral doshas.
services.kalasarpaDesc: Traditional puja for relief from Kalasarpa Dosha.
services.namawaliDesc: Guidance regarding ancestral family records preserved through generations.

faq.subtitle: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.q1: What rituals do you perform at Ramkund, Nashik?
faq.a1: We perform Asthi Visarjan, Pind Daan, Shraddha Vidhi, Dashakriya Vidhi, Narayan Nagbali, Tripindi Shraddha, Pitru Dosh Nivaran and other traditional Vedic rituals.
faq.a2: Asthi Visarjan is the sacred ritual of immersing the ashes of a departed soul in the holy Godavari River according to Hindu traditions.
faq.a3: Yes. We assist families in accessing traditional ancestral records preserved through generations at Nashik.
faq.a4: We primarily serve families from Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, Gujarat, Telugu communities and other regions of India.
faq.q5: Can rituals be booked during Simhastha Kumbh Mela 2027?
faq.a5: Yes. Advance booking is highly recommended due to the large number of pilgrims visiting Nashik during Simhastha.
faq.a6: Yes. We guide families regarding rituals, required materials, local arrangements and scheduling.
